title: Hourly precision in project planning - Ganttly [new app announcement]

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
What if your projects could be planned by the hour instead of just by day?

Say hello to Ganttly - the app that brings real-time precision to your Monday.com Gantt charts.

What’s in the package:

  • Showing Gantt in 15-minute or 1-hour timelines, not just dates

  • Support for subitems – giving you next-level planning precision

  • Easy setup - map only two columns to start

  • Automatic coloring by group - no extra setup needed

With Ganttly:

You gain sharp, hour-level precision in planning

You see clearly when a task starts and ends

You get a full view of how long each group will take to complete

If you could plan with high-level time precision, what would your next sprint look like? Book a demo or Start a free trial to find it out!

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bumping this thread with an update! We just added few features to our Ganttly - Hourly Gantt & Export app:

  • drag & drop to change the item start & end date
  • item bar resizing - to change the item duration
  • exporting the chart to SVG, PNG or CSV.

Export feature is in it’s MVP phase so any feedback will be highly appreciated! Let us know what you think
